name: Ginger Lemonade
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the water on the stove.
2. Peel a 2-3 inch slice of fresh ginger and grate it over a fine mesh grater.
3. Squeeze the grated ginger to remove the juice, discarding any dry pulp.
4. Add the lemon and ginger juice to the boiling water when it reaches a boil.
5. Let steep for 20 minutes.
6. Stir in the honey until dissolved (adjust amount based on preference).
7. Serve chilled - this refreshing drink is perfect for hot days.
